subject: Why I Stopped Trusting EAs (And What I Did Instead)
preview: Una storia veloce. Forse ti ci ritrovi.
body:
[Nome], a quick story.

Like many of you, I bought trading robots that promised wonders. They were black boxes: I had no idea what they were doing, why they entered trades, or when they exited.

And when they lost money, I was left in the dark. That’s the real nightmare: watching your account balance drop and not understanding why.

So, I decided to build the opposite. A system that shows **everything**: every trade explained, the real history, even the years with losses. And an AI that answers every question, in your own language.

Tomorrow, I’ll explain the concept that separates a real strategy from one that’s simply “pasted” onto past data. It’s the difference between a serious system and a scam.

— The PHAI Team
---
Trading involves risk: you can lose part or all of your capital. No returns are guaranteed. The data cited are historical backtests and do not indicate future results.

subject: The Noise That Tricks 90% of Traders
preview: Stai guardando il grafico sbagliato.
body:
[Nome], most look at 5-minute charts. Result? **Pure noise**: emotional decisions, missed stops, panic.

We work on the **daily chart**. Few signals, but clean. PHAI watches the crosses between price and 8 key lines: when the price crosses them in a certain way, a pattern triggers.

Simple to understand. Hard to execute with discipline — and that's why a machine does it, not your emotions.

Tomorrow: the part no one ever shows you. The losses.

— The PHAI Team
---

subject: I’ll even show you the losing years
preview: Chiunque ti mostra solo i mesi belli. Io no.
body:
[Nome], anyone else will only show you the good months. I’ll show you everything.

In our backtest on EURUSD 2010–2025 *(historical simulation)* the system generated 783 trades with a 96.9% win rate. But it also had **years in the red** (2017, 2023, 2025) and a maximum drawdown of around 20%.

Why am I telling you this? Because **a system that never loses doesn’t exist**, and anyone who tells you otherwise is lying.

The difference is that with PHAI, you see everything clearly, on the dashboard, in real time. Check the history with your own eyes 👉 {{demo}}

Tomorrow, I’ll reveal something counterintuitive about our system.

— The PHAI team
---

subject: Why PHAI sometimes does NOTHING (and that’s a good thing)
preview: Confessione contro-intuitiva.
body:
[Nome], confession: there are weeks when PHAI **doesn’t open any trades**. And that’s perfectly fine.

PHAI waits for the right setup instead of forcing trades just to “do something.” Losing traders need constant action. Lasting systems need **patience**.

And here’s the best part: you don’t have to sit through the waiting with anxiety. Open the app, see what the system is watching, ask the AI — and get back to living.

If you’re looking for a daily thrill, we’re not for you. If you want a serious system that works quietly, keep reading tomorrow.

— The PHAI Team
---

subject: What PHAI does while you live your life
preview: Una giornata tipo (e i piani).
body:
[Nome], here's what a day with PHAI looks like:

• The EA monitors EURUSD, GBPUSD, and USDCHF and opens/closes trades according to validated patterns.
• Every move is sent to your phone with a notification and an **explanation**.
• You open the app (available in 4 languages) and see your account, signals, and history. Have a question? Ask the AI assistant, which responds instantly.

No more black boxes. No more "but why did it do that?".

You can get started in 3 ways: **Free Demo** (you see it live), **Starter at €49/month**, or **Pro at €97/month**. Check it out yourself first 👉 {{demo}}

Tomorrow I'll answer the 6 questions I get asked most often.

— The PHAI team

subject: Does it really work? Your 6 Questions
preview: Risposte oneste, senza giri di parole.
body:
[Nome], the 6 questions I always get — honest answers:

1. **Is it a scam?** No, and that's why we show history, drawdown, and a live Demo. Scams hide; we show.
2. **Are profits guaranteed?** No, and beware of anyone who does. We guarantee the software: 30 days, satisfied or refunded.
3. **I don't understand trading.** The AI explains everything, simply, in your language.
4. **What if I lose?** Cautious profile, risk education, everything transparent. But trading involves losses: invest only what you can afford.
5. **Is it hard to install?** There's a 5-minute guide; or we do it for you.
6. **How much does it cost?** You try it free with the Demo. Tomorrow I show you the full offer.

— The PHAI team

preview: Una settimana con PHAI: cosa è normale.

There will be **days, sometimes weeks, without trades**. It’s not a glitch: it's the system waiting for the right setup instead of forcing.
